---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Component
Which component is affected? (e.g. `NeuralButton`, `AIChatInterface`)

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Import `...`
2. Use with props `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Code Snippet

```tsx
// Minimal reproduction
```

## Environment

| | Version |
|---|---|
| **NeuralUI** | <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 --> |
| **Next.js** | <!-- e.g. 15.0.0 --> |
| **React** | <!-- e.g. 19.0.0 --> |
| **Tailwind CSS** | <!-- e.g. 4.0.0 --> |
| **Browser** | <!-- e.g. Chrome 121 --> |
| **OS** | <!-- e.g. macOS 14 --> |

## Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording.
